overview.description: The Obra Defensive High Yield ETF (ODHY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund actively invests in high yield corporate bonds, selected using a bottom-up, value-driven process. The fund explicitly targets USD-denominated securities. ODHY was launched on Jun 30, 2025 and is issued by Obra.
